reason: Successfully verified that the agent can execute browser commands and retrieve the page title from example.com, confirming the response mentions "Example Domain"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing SuperAgent interface with agent list in sidebar
Clicked on agent "QA-20260617-225342-fqkp" in the sidebar — Agent interface opened with chat input area ready
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the chat input — Message successfully entered in the textbox
Clicked "Send message" button — Message was sent and agent status changed to "working", new session "Browser Page Title Lookup" was created
Waited for agent response with polling every 2 seconds — Agent completed its work after approximately 17 seconds

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" by taking snapshot — Response clearly visible stating "The page title is "Example Domain"." and final summary confirms "Done. The page at https://example.com has the title "Example Domain""
Took full-page screenshot of the response — Screenshot successfully captured showing complete agent interaction and response with multiple confirmations of "Example Domain" text
